rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.022, which governs Sunset Act applicability to the Department of Housing and Community Affairs.
quote: The Texas Department of Housing and Community Affairs is subject to Chapter 325 (Texas Sunset Act). Unless continued in existence as provided by that chapter, the department is abolished and this chapter expires September 1, 2029.
_note: No conflict; cited rule concerns sunset review of TDHCA, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
